prompt: 我想用 auto-browser 来自动化处理淘宝和虾皮(Shopee)的消息收集。这些网站都有很强的反爬和验证码机制（滑块验证码、设备指纹检测、短信验证等）。帮我规划一下整体方案，用什么策略来处理这些验证码问题最靠谱？

assertions.name: recommends-cookie-reuse-first
assertions.description: The answer recommends cookie persistence as the primary/priority strategy over other approaches
assertions.expected: Clearly states cookie reuse as the best approach, with --cookies-path usage example

assertions.name: describes-cookie-workflow
assertions.description: The answer explains the full cookie persistence workflow: first-time login with headed browser, save cookies, reuse for subsequent tasks
assertions.expected: Describes the two-phase process: initial headed login with --cookies-path, then subsequent headless runs with same cookie file

assertions.name: mentions-handoff-fallback
assertions.description: The answer describes handoff mode as a fallback when cookies are unavailable or expired
assertions.expected: References handoff command or handoff mode for cases where AI can't handle the CAPTCHA

assertions.name: explains-handoff-resume-flow
assertions.description: The answer explains the complete handoff + resume flow: AI fills credentials, human solves CAPTCHA, AI resumes and continues
assertions.expected: Describes the sequence: task runs → encounters CAPTCHA → handoff → human solves → resume with --planner-model

assertions.name: mentions-credential-store
assertions.description: The answer mentions using the credential store for the initial login
assertions.expected: References ~/.auto-browser/credentials.json or --credentials-path for storing site credentials

assertions.name: prioritizes-correctly
assertions.description: The answer correctly prioritizes cookie reuse over handoff over fully automatic, explaining when to use each
assertions.expected: Cookie reuse presented as primary, handoff as fallback, fully automatic as last resort
